module cache_top ( clk, rst, cpu_rd, cpu_wr, addr, wdata, rdata, hit, ready );
  input [7:0] addr;
  input [31:0] wdata;
  output [31:0] rdata;
  input clk, rst, cpu_rd, cpu_wr;
  output hit, ready;


  cache_controller DUT ( .clk(clk), .rst(rst), .cpu_rd(cpu_rd), .cpu_wr(cpu_wr), .addr(addr), .cpu_wdata(wdata), .cpu_rdata(rdata), .hit(hit), .ready(ready)
         );
endmodule
